user.title: MeshCore Chat
user.description: Add the MeshCore Chat companion integration. The core meshcore integration must also be installed for the panel to receive messages.

abort.meshcore_not_installed: The MeshCore integration is not installed. Install it from HACS first, then add MeshCore Chat.

init.title: MeshCore Chat options
init.description: Tune how long the message store retains conversation history. Changes take effect on the next message save and at the next Home Assistant restart.

data_description.max_messages_per_conversation: When a conversation exceeds this number, the oldest messages are trimmed first. Range: 50 – 5000. Default: 500.
data_description.message_retention_days: Messages older than this are pruned at startup and during periodic cleanup. Range: 1 – 365. Default: 90.
